overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a walk through Night City during golden hour. The player approaches an NCPD police investigation scene with holographic police cruisers, then continues along a multi-lane highway passing under futuristic overpasses with digital billboards and graffiti-covered walls.

events.description: pedestrian crosses the street from left to right in front of camera
camera turns right toward police scene and begins crossing street

agents.ego_description: walking along city sidewalk and crossing toward a police investigation scene

notable_agents.action: walking across the street wearing purple jacket and carrying bag
black truck driving along the road past the intersection

entered.detail: futuristic traffic signal with glowing blue and red holographic display
large cylindrical rusted metal industrial tanks with pipes
tall multi-level tower with glass facade and industrial scaffolding
futuristic police car with holographic POLICE and NCPD text on sides

segments.scene_description: The scene opens at a futuristic urban intersection during golden hour. The camera approaches a traffic light with holographic displays, then turns toward an NCPD police scene. Industrial tanks and a massive skyscraper dominate the background while vehicles pass by on the multi-lane road.

scene_state.functional_zone: police investigation site on grassy roadside

events.description: moves from paved asphalt onto grassy dirt area containing police vehicles
passes close by NCPD police cruiser temporarily blocking view of background

agents.ego_description: walking through police cordon past officers and damaged vehicles on the roadside

notable_agents.action: police officer in tactical gear standing near damaged sports car
police officer observing the investigation scene

entered.detail: beige and blue vintage pickup truck with front end damage parked on grass
dark gray futuristic sports car with crash damage and open doors
large metal framework structure with pipes and walkways

segments.scene_description: The camera moves onto a grassy roadside area where NCPD officers investigate a vehicle crash. A holographic police cruiser sits near a damaged vintage truck and sports car. Officers stand guard as the camera passes through the cordon, with industrial structures visible in the background.

scene_state.functional_zone: multi-lane urban highway with elevated infrastructure

events.description: yellow sports car speeds past on the right side of the highway
slight acceleration while walking along the highway shoulder

agents.ego_description: walking along the highway shoulder next to moderate traffic flow

notable_agents.action: yellow sports car overtaking traffic at high speed

entered.detail: steep angled concrete wall with red trim and metal panels
elevated roadway structure with directional signs pointing to Rocky Ridge
tall palm trees lining the upper edge of the highway

segments.scene_description: The camera moves along a wide multi-lane highway during golden hour, with the futuristic city skyline visible ahead. Traffic flows past on the right while the camera stays on the shoulder. A red retaining wall runs alongside the road, and overhead highway signs indicate directions toward Rocky Ridge.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered highway underpass with digital signage

events.description: enters covered area beneath multiple concrete overpasses
passes directly under concrete overpass structure temporarily blocking sky

agents.ego_description: continuing along highway corridor passing under overpasses and alongside graffiti walls

entered.detail: massive concrete highway overpass with thick support pillars and metal railings
concrete retaining wall covered in colorful cyberpunk graffiti and tags
large illuminated screen displaying animated food advertisements
tall metal electrical tower with multiple high-voltage cables

segments.scene_description: The camera moves into a semi-covered highway corridor beneath massive concrete overpasses. The walls are covered in vibrant graffiti, and large digital billboards display animated advertisements. The lighting becomes more diffused as the camera passes under the bridge structures, with electrical pylons and cables visible against the sky.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a bustling urban intersection into the shadowed depths of a futuristic highway corridor during the golden hour. It begins by approaching a traffic light with holographic displays, turning toward an NCPD investigation scene set against a backdrop of industrial tanks and a massive skyscraper. As the camera moves onto a grassy roadside, it passes through a police cordon where officers guard a holographic cruiser and crashed vehicles before merging back onto the shoulder of a wide multi-lane highway. The scene then expands along a red retaining wall with overhead signs pointing toward Rocky Ridge, while the city skyline looms ahead. Finally, the open road shifts into a semi-covered corridor beneath massive concrete overpasses, where the golden light becomes diffused among vibrant graffiti and glowing digital billboards.
